trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: A staff note dated Jan 15, 2026 8:44:17 AM states: "FRAUD ALERT: Customer has 16 refunds in 33 days. ALL claims are 'item not received' but tracking confirms delivery. Total refunded: $987.44. Refund rate: 90%. DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately." WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000506 → Notes for this Order / Comments History section on the order view page (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/506/). WHY IT MATTERS: The explicit staff instruction with quantified fraud metrics (16 refunds in 33 days, $987.44 refunded, 90% refund rate) directs that refunds must not be processed and instead escalated to Loss Prevention, overriding the customer's current claim.
